name: enfurbish
description: Claude Code plugins by phreakocious: session continuity and project-instruction approval gating.

plugins.name: continuity
plugins.description: Intentional session continuity: /wrap retro, /next command, and a SessionStart hook that surfaces NEXT_SESSION.md handoffs.

plugins.name: affirm
plugins.description: Approval gate for project instructions. Surfaces new or modified CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/* files at session start before Claude treats them as trusted.
